title: Copyright Act 1994 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand's primary legislation governing copyright ownership, infringement, moral rights, and remedies. Establishes legal framework for protection of literary, dramatic, musical, artistic works, sound recordings, films, and communication works, with provisions for permitted acts, enforcement mechanisms, and digital-age amendments including internet service provider liability.
